dagittyplus 0.4.0

    • A SEM user's guide to dagitty for R
    • Plotting dagittyplus models with ggdag
  • Changelog
  • Web app

Package index

Create and load models

dagitty()
Parse DAGitty Graph
as.dagitty()
Convert to DAGitty object
is.dagitty()
Test for Graph Class
getExample()
Get Bundled Examples
downloadGraph()
Load Graph from dagitty.net
randomDAG()
Generate DAG at Random
graphLayout()
Generate Graph Layout
canonicalize()
Canonicalize an Ancestral Graph
completeDAG()
Generate Complete DAG

Variables and their roles

exposures() `exposures<-`() outcomes() `outcomes<-`() latents() `latents<-`() adjustedNodes() `adjustedNodes<-`() selectedNodes() `selectedNodes<-`() setVariableStatus()
Variable Statuses
coordinates() `coordinates<-`()
Plot Coordinates of Variables in Graph
names(<dagitty>)
Names of Variables in Graph

Graph relations

descendants() ancestors() children() parents() neighbours() spouses() adjacentNodes() markovBlanket()
Ancestral Relations
exogenousVariables()
Retrieve Exogenous Variables

Edges, paths, and structure

edges()
Graph Edges
paths()
Show Paths
graphType()
Get Graph Type
isAcyclic() findCycle()
Test for Cycles
isCollider()
Test for Colliders
topologicalOrdering()
Get Topological Ordering of DAG

Causal effect identification

adjustmentSets()
Covariate Adjustment Sets
isAdjustmentSet()
Adjustment Criterion
backDoorGraph()
Back-Door Graph
instrumentalVariables()
Find Instrumental Variables

d-separation and testable implications

dconnected() dseparated()
d-Separation
impliedConditionalIndependencies()
List Implied Conditional Independencies
localTests() ciTest()
Test Graph against Data
plotLocalTestResults()
Plot Results of Local Tests
vanishingTetrads()
List Implied Vanishing Tetrads
impliedCovarianceMatrix()
Implied Covariance Matrix of a Gaussian Graphical Model

Equivalence and graph transformations

equivalenceClass() equivalentDAGs()
Generating Equivalent Models
orientPDAG()
Orient Edges in PDAG.
moralize()
Moral Graph
ancestorGraph()
Ancestor Graph
toMAG()
Convert DAG to MAG.
measurementPart()
Extract Measurement Part from Structural Equation Model
structuralPart()
Extract Structural Part from Structural Equation Model

Data simulation

simulateSEM()
Simulate Data from Structural Equation Model
simulateLogistic()
Simulate Binary Data from DAG Structure

Conversion and interoperability

convert()
Convert from DAGitty object to other graph types
lavaanToGraph()
Convert Lavaan Model to DAGitty Graph

Plotting

plot(<dagitty>)
Plot Graph

Shiny app

launch_dagittyplus()
Launch the DAGitty+ Shiny application

On this page
